display_name: SNTL: DePIN Spatial Intelligence & Autonomous x402 DataLake
name: SNTL Helium Intelligence
target_audience: Autonomous AI Agents, DePIN Fleet Managers, Systems Architects
description: SNTL is an autonomous spatial-intelligence and security engine for Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks (DePIN). It ingests raw Solana SVM substreams and Helium network telemetry, then serves AI-classified threat tiers, anomaly scores, H3 geospatial hotspots, wallet/audience intelligence, and forensic chronicles over an enriched datalake of 600K+ on-chain events across 12 program shards. Every query is machine-payable via native x402 micro-payments (Solana mainnet USDC) — no signup, no API key, pay per call; first tier free.

metadata.payment_integration: x402 / PayAI facilitator — Solana mainnet USDC
metadata.datalake_depth: 600K+ enriched on-chain events across 12 Helium program shards
metadata.pricing: $0.01 USDC per call; first tier free
